data.name: NATURAL CORDE
data.detailed_description:
Kouta has always been compared to his older brother, Shouma. Not only is Shouma the ace pitcher of the baseball club, he's also smart and an all-around great person. Always having felt like he just can't compete, Kouta has harbored an inferiority complex towards his brother for as long as he can remember. However, even as he wallows in the gloom of living in the shadow of his brother, Yuuna, Kouta’s childhood friend and crush, never fails to brighten his day.

Kouta fantasizes day and night about being together with Yuuna, but he's held back from confessing his feelings by dreary thoughts brought on by years of being number two to his brother. That is, until one day when he actually finds out she's dating Shouma and has been for a while. After being hit in the face with the cruel truth, something shatters inside Kouta. He decides to commit the ultimate betrayal... Stealing Yuuna away from Shouma by winning her over.

A gripping story of love and betrayal awaits you in this visual novel. Every line of text will have you on the edge of your seat as Kouta does whatever it takes to make Yuuna his. After all, sometimes you have to be prepared to lose it all to get what you want.

Step Into Another's Shoes

See the world from Kouta's perspective as you advance through the narrative. Will he succeed in his desperate quest or will Yuuna's love for Shouma prevail?

data.short_description: Yuuna is Kouta's beautiful childhood friend, and he's had a crush on her for as long as he can remember. However, when Kouta finds out she's dating his perfect older brother, he resolves to do the unthinkable and win over Yuuna's heart.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and KI-SofTWarE, All Rights Reserved.
